response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and deep technical fluency across languages and systems, including AI-agent infrastructure work; however, he lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or the 15-year technical depth required for a director-level IC role, with most roles being senior rather than principal-level and no advanced degree in AI.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Strong full-stack and systems engineering across diverse tech (DLang, TypeScript, cloud infra)
Active knowledge sharing and workshop leadership in testing, web internals, and TDD
concerns: No demonstrable AI/ML product or platform built with AI, only AI-agent tooling contributions
Lacks evidence of cloud product strategy leadership or direct customer advisory experience
Education is a BS in CS; no Master's or PhD in AI-related field as preferred
